channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Mahomes throws for TD and runs for score as Chiefs beat Texans 27-19 to close in on No. 1 seed
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Patrick Mahomes knew he could run on the ankle he sprained last week. The bigger concern for the Chiefs quarterback was how he would stop, when all the weight and pressure and momentum would land squarely upon it. The solution against Houston was simple: Mahomes didn't stop.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: First baseman Paul Goldschmidt and the Yankees agree to a $12.5 million, 1-year deal, AP source says
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — First baseman Paul Goldschmidt and the New York Yankees agreed Saturday to a $12.5 million, one-year contract, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: First baseman Paul Goldschmidt and the Yankees agree to a $12.5 million, 1-year deal, AP source says
item.description: A person familiar with the negotiations tells The Associated Press that first baseman Paul Goldschmidt and the New York Yankees agreed to a $12.5 million, one-year contract.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Bronny James discusses the challenge of dealing with his mental health following cardiac scare
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — The final buzzer sounded Saturday, the South Bay Lakers had won a game and Bronny James seemed completely at ease. Big smile. Handshakes with everyone. Even did a little dance step as he got to the bench.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Man City crisis deepens after another loss and Arsenal closes gap on Liverpool
item.description: Manchester City’s stunning slump deepened after losing to Aston Villa 2-1 in the Premier League on Saturday. Goals from Jhon Duran and Morgan Rogers at Villa Park consigned the four-time defending champion to a ninth defeat in 12 games in a season that is unravelling.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Knueppel scores 18 points as No. 5 Duke romps to 82-56 win over Georgia Tech
item.description: Kon Knueppel scored 18 points, Cooper Flagg celebrated his 18th birthday by chipping in 13 and No. 5 Duke romped to an 82-56 victory over Georgia Tech. The Blue Devils improved to 10-2 and led by double figures much of the game against the 5-7 Yellow Jackets.
item.dc:creator: Paul Newberry, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Falcons expected to release Kirk Cousins after just one season following lackluster play: report
item.description: The Atlanta Falcons are expected to release quarterback Kirk Cousins after just one season due to lackluster play, with rookie Michael Penix Jr. taking his place.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Women’s college basketball: Four takeaways from Stanford, UCLA at Chase Center
item.description: Nunu Agara has a big game for Stanford, Lauren Betts-less UCLA still dominant in San Francisco at Bay Area Women’s Classic.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Soccer's top players have had enough, as FIFA's new super-sized tournament sparks a revolt
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — One of the most striking moments of soccer in 2024 was when Rodri hobbled onto a stage in Paris on crutches to receive the prestigious Ballon d’Or for best male player of the year.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Joel Embiid returns from sinus fracture to play against Charlotte
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Joel Embiid started for the Philadelphia 76ers against Charlotte on Friday night after missing a game because of a sinus fracture. Embiid was introduced to a roaring ovation and wore a protective “ Phantom of the Opera ” mask in his return.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Security guards tackle two women to the ground during Knicks-Timberwolves game after they ran onto court
item.description: Two NBA fans attempted to storm the court Thursday night during the New York Knicks' win over the Minnesota Timberwolves, but the two women were tackled to the ground by security.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Vikings' Daniel Jones gives former Giants teammates Christmas gifts despite being released: report
item.description: Minnesota Vikings quarterback Daniel Jones bought his former Giants offensive linemen Christmas gifts despite being released by the team in November, according to a report.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NCAA president says there are 'less than 10' transgender athletes in college sports
item.description: NCAA President Charlie Baker said it is “debatable” whether transgender women will “always” have a physical advantage over cisgender, or non-transgender, women.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, NewsNation
